# START HERE

This folder is the Genie startup and recovery folder.

Use it before editing code.

Read these files first:

1. AGENT_ORDERS.md
2. docs/PROJECT_RECOVERY_CONTEXT.md
3. dist/RUN_ANY_REPO_STANDARD.md
4. dist/RUNNER_MANIFEST.json

The workflow is:

- inspect repo
- preserve work
- detect stack
- install needed tools
- run project
- commit changes
- push branch
- report proof

Proof fields:

- Repository
- Branch
- Commit SHA
- PR Link
- Detected stack
- Install result
- Run result
- Local URL
- Files changed
- Blockers
